name: E-Commerce Domain Ontology

classes.name: Order
properties: status (enum: pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, refunded)

constraints: Order.totalAmount must equal the sum over all its OrderItems of (quantity * unitPrice)
Only Products where inStock=true may appear in new Orders
Order.status must be one of the allowed enumerated values
Every OrderItem must refer to exactly one Product
examples: Customer CUST-1001 (gold tier) placed Order ORD-98765 which contains 3x Product SKU-42 (Wireless Headphones Pro, price 129.99) and currently has status=shipped
Product SKU-17 belongs to category=clothing and is currently inStock=false
